problem: A fair 6-sided die is rolled.  What is the probability that the number rolled is a divisor of 6?

classified_questions.question: What is a divisor? Can you give an example?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Can you list all the possible outcomes when rolling a fair 6-sided die?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Of the outcomes, how many are divisors of 6?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How did you come up with the number of divisors of 6?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What is the probability of rolling a divisor of 6?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can the same approach be used to find the probability of rolling a divisor of any other number? If so, how?
classified_questions.label: b
